name: The Vault
description: Adult content for Rewind — password-gated catalog + search (ThePornDB metadata; Zilean / Torznab / apiJAV / Rapidgator sourcing; on-demand debrid playback). Stays fully isolated from every normal library. Installing reveals the Adult library kind, the Adult sources section, and the ThePornDB credential.

configKeys.label: ThePornDB
configKeys.description: API token from api.theporndb.net → API tokens. Powers adult metadata + search.
